allow: Bash(xargs -I{} gh issue close {} --comment "Closing — this issue was filed for a WARNING-level finding. Only ERROR-level findings will be tracked going forward.")
Bash(xargs -I{} gh issue close {} --comment "Closing — WARNING-level finding. Only ERROR-level findings tracked going forward." done echo "Done")
Bash(xargs -I{} gh issue close {} --comment "Closing — WARNING-level finding. Only ERROR-level findings tracked going forward.")
